channel.title: Wordpress on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Wordpress on Mike Ball

item.title: wp2middleman
item.description:
wp2middleman is a Ruby gem that migrates the Wordpress posts in a Wordpress XML export file to middleman-style markdown files.

wp2middleman provides a wp2mm commandline executable, as well as a WP2Middleman module.

View source and documentation on Github »

item.title: Deploying Wordpress to Pagodabox
item.description: A beginner's guide to deploying a Wordpress app to Pagodabox's cloud service.

item.title: Quiet Logger: HTML5 WordPress Theme
item.description: An overview of a basic Wordpress theme I was tasked in creating.

item.title: Taylor & Juliette
item.description: I created a simple brochure website and letter-pressed invite for Taylor & Juliette’s wedding. The website and invite feature original illustrations, as well as a hand-drawn typeface created for the wedding materials.
